description: CompositionGrey melange shorts made of 100% cotton, has an elastic waist with a drawcord on the inside, insert pockets on the sides, welt pocket on the right hip and embroidered brand logo on the left leg hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowWarm iron, but do not iron on designDo not dry cleanBuilt with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, this nike shorts from the Athletic Department collection comes in a body friendly design. This high-performance shorts made of cotton keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets.
